message.content:
@startuml
title PI::calculate(double measured, double resultBuffer)

actor "Aktuatorenhed" as Aktuatorenhed
participant "PI" as PI

Actuatorenhed --> PI : calculate(measured, resultBuffer)

PI --> PI : error = _setpoint - measured

PI --> PI : integral = (_Ts/2)*(error+_preError)+_preIntegral
note right of PI : udregning af integrale

PI --> PI : maxIntegral = (100*_Ti)/_Kp
note right of PI : Anti-Windup

alt [integral > maxIntegral]
    PI --> PI : integral = maxIntegral
    PI --> PI : integral = 0
    alt [integral < 0]
        PI --> PI : integral = 0
    end
end

PI --> PI : proportional = error
note right of PI : udregning af proportional

PI --> PI : controlSignal = _Kp*(proportional+(1/_Ti)*integral)
note right of PI : udregning af styresignal

alt [controlSignal < _minOut]
    PI --> PI : controlSignal = _minOut
    note right of PI : Max, Min afgrænsninger. 0-100% dutycycle
end

alt [controlSignal > _maxOut]
    PI --> PI : controlSignal = _maxOut
    note right of PI : Max, Min afgrænsninger. 0-100% dutycycle
end

PI --> PI : resultBuffer = controlSignal
note right of PI : return result

PI --> PI : _preError = error
PI --> PI : _preIntegrale=integrale
note right of PI : Opdaterer hukommelse for error og integrale

alt [controlSignal == _minOut]
    PI --> Aktuatorenhed : return -1
end

alt [controlSignal == _maxOut]
    PI --> Aktuatorenhed : return -2
end

alt
    PI --> Aktuatorenhed : return 0
end

@enduml
